paper_title: A General Language Assistant as a Laboratory for Alignment

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a suite of alignment techniques including prompting, context distillation, and preference modeling pre-training (PMP), demonstrating that simple interventions like prompting significantly improve alignment across tasks and scale with model size
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Filtered Common Crawl, internet books, Python code data
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language assistance, alignment evaluation, safety testing, instruction following
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing aligned language models that are helpful, honest, and harmless
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on downstream tasks (e.g., summarization, ethics, coding)
raw_extraction.paper_title: A General Language Assistant as a Laboratory for Alignment

raw_extraction.innovation: Uses a simple HHH prompt to guide model behavior, showing significant improvement in helpfulness, honesty, and harmlessness without compromising performance on core tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Filtered Common Crawl, internet books, Python code data
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language assistance, alignment evaluation, safety testing, instruction following
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing aligned language models that are helpful, honest, and harmless
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on downstream tasks (e.g., summarization, ethics, coding)
raw_extraction.paper_title: A General Language Assistant as a Laboratory for Alignment

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces context distillation—a technique that finetunes a model to match the conditional distribution of a prompt, allowing efficient transfer of alignment behavior without consuming context window space
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Filtered Common Crawl, internet books, Python code data
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language assistance, alignment evaluation, safety testing, instruction following
raw_extraction.research_problem: Developing aligned language models that are helpful, honest, and harmless
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on downstream tasks (e.g., summarization, ethics, coding)
raw_extraction.paper_title: A General Language Assistant as a Laboratory for Alignment

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces a preference model pre-training (PMP) phase that trains on large-scale public preference data to improve sample efficiency when later fine-tuned on small, human-labeled datasets
raw_extraction.application: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), alignment evaluation, safety training
raw_extraction.research_problem: Improving sample efficiency in preference-based alignment training
raw_extraction.paper_title: A General Language Assistant as a Laboratory for Alignment
